subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from this servant unto her whom God hath related unto His servant, that she may know that We have not forgotten her and whatsoever proceedeth from Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا العبد الی التی نسبها الله بعبده لیعلم بانا ما انسیناها و کلما نجری
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
